Story Coffee Menu Gallery Experience Visit

Karachi, Pakistan

North Nazimabad, Karachi

A room to put the phone down

Mazi is a specialty coffee shop built on nostalgia. We pour patient coffee and ask you to talk to the person across the table.

Visit the café

Our story

Built like a memory of an old café

Mazi began with a simple idea: that a cup of coffee should slow you down, not speed you up. The room is shaped by the cafés our families remembered, the ones with creaking chairs and conversations that ran past midnight.

Read our story

Featured drinks

What people come back for

A short list, poured with care. The full menu waits on its own page.

Cardamom Kulhad

Espresso steamed with green cardamom in a clay cup. Warm, familiar, and ours alone.

Slow Pour V60

Clean, floral, bright. Brewed to order from a rotating single origin, never rushed.

Cold Brew

Steeped eighteen hours, then cut with cold water. Smooth, low-acid, easy to love.

See the full menu

Coffee philosophy

We treat the bean like a story

Every origin is tasted blind, sourced with care, and roasted in small batches. We would rather serve one cup beautifully than ten in a hurry.

Our coffee

The experience

Disconnect to reconnect

No Wi-Fi on the tables by design. Phones go face-down. What you get back is the room, the steam, and the person in front of you.

  • 01

    The Slow Hour

    Mornings before ten are kept quiet on purpose. Come for the stillness.

  • 02

    The Long Table

    One shared table in the middle of the room. Strangers become regulars.

  • 03

    The Vinyl Nights

    Friday evenings run on records and refills. No screens, just sound.

The full experience

Step inside before you arrive

Every corner of Mazi was set down for a reason. Take a look around.

We are in North Nazimabad, open early and closing late. Come as you are.
